title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 540.270 - Indictments — presented to court — filed
text:
540.270.  Indictments — presented to court — filed. — Indictments found and presentments made by a grand jury shall be presented by their foreperson, in their presence, to the court, and shall be there filed and remain as records of such court.
(RSMo 1939 § 3928, A.L. 1989 S.B. 127, et al.) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3539; 1919 § 3884; 1909 § 5092
